    About the match

      Pisa faces Cagliari at Arena Garibaldi - Stadio Romeo Anconetani on Sun, Mar 15, 2026, 14:00 UTC. This match is part of the Serie A. You can check the recent head-to-head encounters, as well as full H2H record on this page to see how Pisa and Cagliari have fared against each other in the past. On FotMob, you can follow the Pisa vs Cagliari live score with a full set of match features, including:

    • Live updates: Every goal, card, substitution and key moment instantly delivered on FotMob.

    • Real-time extensive stats powered by Opta: Possession, shots, corners, big chances created, xG, momentum, and shot maps.

    • The lineups are:
      Pisa (3-4-3): Nícolas - Arturo Calabresi, Simone Canestrelli, Antonio Caracciolo - Mehdi Léris, Michel Aebischer, Marius Marin, Samuele Angori - Stefano Moreo, Rafiu Durosinmi, Mattéo Tramoni.
      Cagliari (4-4-2): Elia Caprile - Zé Pedro, Yerry Mina, Alberto Dossena, Adam Obert - Marco Palestra, Michel Ndary Adopo, Gianluca Gaetano, Ibrahim Sulemana - Semih Kiliçsoy, Michael Folorunsho.

    • Unavailable players for Pisa: Daniel Denoon (injury). Cagliari does not have any unavailable players.

    • Team form & Head-to-head history: Compare recent results and see how Pisa and Cagliari have performed against each other. The current head to head record for the teams are Pisa 0 win(s), Cagliari 1 win(s), and 3 draw(s).

    • TV and streaming info: Find out where to watch the match.

    • Live standings: Follow league tables and tournament info in real time.

    • Live odds & insights: Track match favorites and before, during and post match.

    • Commentary & ticker: Rich text commentary for major matches to follow the action even if you can't watch.

    Insights

    • Bottom of Serie A with only one win from 28 matches this season

    • Four straight losses marks Pisa's worst run under one manager since 1987

    • Pisa haven't won a match in 17 attempts, their last victory coming in October

    • Pisa sit bottom of Serie A, 14.3 points below their expected points total

    • Sit 15th but rank 18th in the xG table, suggesting underlying quality concerns

    • Cagliari scored just two goals across their last five matches

    • Cagliari are winless in five matches, scoring just twice in that run

    • Sebastiano Esposito has created the most big chances for Cagliari with 10
